<!--
Keep this short. A PR description explains *why*, not *what* — the diff
already shows what changed.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences: what does this PR do, and why does it exist? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, dependencies, repository maintenance
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `ci` — pipeline / workflow changes

## Verification

<!-- How did you confirm this works? CI covers lint/typecheck/test/build
     automatically — use this section for anything CI can't check:
     manual testing, screenshots, browser verification, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build` pass locally
- [ ] No unrelated files included in this diff
- [ ] Docs updated if this changes a documented behavior or contract
